version_description: Complete version played with Capo 1 ,simple finger pluck intro and Instrumental.Nice to play with acoustic guitar.try to emphasis the added bass notes.You Tube : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s09LuDYX12g.

versions.version_description: Uses more detailed chords (with bass inversions) for the Chorus part.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Kool And The Gang - Cherish

                  CAPO 1 ,  You Tube : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s09LuDYX12g
[ch]Dm7/C[/ch]     x30211
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     103210
[ch]Am7[/ch]       x02010
[ch]Em7[/ch]       020030
[ch]Gsus4[/ch]     330013
[ch]G7[/ch]        320001
[ch]Am7/G[/ch]     302010
[ch]Dm7/G[/ch]     300211
[ch]E7[/ch]        020100

   [Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]


   [Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Let's take a walk together near the ocean shore[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Hand in hand, you and I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Let's cherish every moment we have been given[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
For time is passing by[/tab]


   [Pre Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm7/C[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
I often pray before I lay down by your side[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
If you receive your calling before I awake[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gsus4[/ch]                       [ch]G7[/ch]
Could I make it through the night[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Cherish the love we have[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7/G[/ch]
We     should cherish the life we live (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Cherish the love, cherish the life, cherish the love[/tab]


   [Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
The world is always changing, nothing stays the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
But love will stand the test of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
The next life that we live in remains to be seen[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Will you be by my side[/tab]


   [Pre Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm7/C[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]
I often pray before I lay down by your side[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
If you receive your calling before I awake[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gsus4[/ch]                       [ch]G7[/ch]
Could I make it through the night[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Cherish the love we have[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7/G[/ch]
We     should cherish the life we live (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Cherish the love, cherish the life, cherish the love[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Cherish the love we have[/tab]
                   (Let's cherish every moment we have together)
[tab][ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                   [ch]Dm7/G[/ch]
For    as   long as we both shall live[/tab]
                                 (Hand in hand,you and I)
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Cherish the love, cherish the life, cherish the love[/tab]


[Instrumetal]
[ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Dm7/C[/ch]
Cherish the love[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Cherish the life[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Cherish the love we have[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7/G[/ch]
We     should cherish the life we live (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Cherish the love, cherish the life, cherish the love[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Cherish the love we have[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]                      [ch]Dm7/G[/ch]
We     should cherish the life we live (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Cherish the love, cherish the life, cherish the love[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Cherish the love we have[/tab]
                   (Let's cherish every moment we have together)
[tab][ch]Am7/G[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]                   [ch]Dm7/G[/ch]
For    as   long as we both shall live[/tab]
                                 (Hand in hand,you and I)
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
Cherish the love, cherish the life, cherish the love[/tab]


Mark W
